## Checklist

- [ ] `./mvnw verify` passes locally (runs archetype generation + full generated project test suite)
- [ ] Template files use correct Velocity escape sequences (`$symbol_pound`, `$symbol_dollar`, `$symbol_escape`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new files added to `archetype-resources/` without a corresponding entry in `archetype-metadata.xml`
